# Copilot instructions for this repository

This repository is building an **AutoResearch Safe Starter** for **Akash**, based on [karpathy/autoresearch](https://github.com/karpathy/autoresearch).

When you work here:

- Prioritize **beginner-friendly documentation**. Assume the reader is new to Akash, autonomous coding agents, and this codebase.
- Prioritize **security**, **reproducibility**, and **Akash Console usability** over clever shortcuts.
- **Never hardcode secrets** or example credentials in code, docs, scripts, tests, or screenshots.
- Prefer **simple, explicit shell scripts** over clever abstractions or complex wrappers.
- Use **`/data`** for persistent outputs.
- Use **`/data/logs`** for logs.
- Use **`/data/output`** for run artifacts.
- When updating the README, explain changes clearly and keep the language accessible to non-expert developers.
- Keep prompts, setup steps, and documentation written for **non-expert developers**.
- Favor **incremental PRs** over giant rewrites. Small, reviewable changes are preferred.

If you add automation or deployment guidance, make the defaults safe, obvious, and easy to follow from the Akash Console.
